title: [TACZ]LesRaisins Append Pack
body:
# TaC-Reforged: LesRaisins Append Pack This project is no longer being maintained. The LesRaisins Append Pack has existed since the TAC era, and much of its content, by today’s standards, varies greatly in quality — some of it can frankly be considered poor. In addition, many of the original source assets have long been lost to time, and we no longer have the resources or practical means to refurbish them. Thank you all for your understanding and support. ## Intro An addon mod of Timeless and Classics Guns. Added a varieties of new guns, throwable items, and some tactical equipment. This mod was originally developed as an experiment for the server of the same name 'LesRaisins', and is now publicly available as an addon of TaC. ## Dependency [The TAC/TACZ versions required for the addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-guns) are shown in the table below.
Minecraft version Addon version TAC/TACZ version
1.16.5 0.1.2.x 0.3.9.2 (LesRaisins forked)
0.1.3 0.3.10.5
0.1.4.3 0.3.11.2
0.1.4.4 0.3.12.2
0.1.4.6 0.3.13.2
0.1.4.7 0.3.14.2
1.20.1 0.2.3 1.0.3(TACZ)
0.3.0 1.1.4+(TACZ)
You also need the Obfuscate (0.6.3) as a dependency of TaC in 1.16.5 version. ## Contributors **Developers**: xjqsh **Data Designer**: Midori_Poi **Artists**：LeComte, Receke, Licease, Pos_233, Rhodes_koei, Soret, Peny **Translator**：Sahasan(Russian), HCodeG(Persian) (The list is in no particular order)
